Test Title: Verify audit tables exist with expected columns
Description: Verify both audit tables are present and contain all required columns used by delta macros.
Steps: Run DESC TABLE for both tables; compare returned columns against expected columns used in macros.
Expected Result: Both tables exist and all required columns are present with valid datatypes.

Test Title: Verify RUNNING row is inserted at start of product delta
Description: Validate that product delta macro inserts/updates a RUNNING row before data processing.
Pre-Requisite: Set ETL_BATCH_ID; execute delta_load_product_file_v2_merge for any STG model
Steps: Query AUDIT_PROCESS_LOG by ETL_BATCH_ID and MODEL_NAME='SAT_PRODUCT_FILE' immediately after macro start.
Expected Result: One row exists with PROCESS_STATUS='RUNNING', START_TIMESTAMP populated, END_TIMESTAMP null.

Test Title: Verify SUCCESS update after product delta completion
Description: Validate completion status and metrics are updated after successful product delta.
Pre-Requisite: A product delta run has completed successfully for the ETL_BATCH_ID
Steps: Query AUDIT_PROCESS_LOG for that ETL_BATCH_ID and MODEL_NAME='SAT_PRODUCT_FILE'.
Expected Result: PROCESS_STATUS='SUCCESS'; END_TIMESTAMP populated; ROWS_PROCESSED equals DELTA_INSERTED_ROWS + DELTA_UPDATED_ROWS; ERROR_MESSAGE is empty.

Test Title: Verify identifier delta writes audit row correctly
Description: Validate identifier macro logs RUNNING then SUCCESS with correct model name.
Steps: Query AUDIT_PROCESS_LOG for ETL_BATCH_ID and MODEL_NAME='SAT_IDENTIFIER'.
Expected Result: Row exists; final PROCESS_STATUS='SUCCESS'; timestamps and delta counters populated correctly.

Test Title: Verify relationship delta writes audit row correctly
Description: Validate relationship macro logs RUNNING then SUCCESS with correct model name.
Steps: Query AUDIT_PROCESS_LOG for ETL_BATCH_ID and MODEL_NAME='SAT_RELATIONSHIP'.
Expected Result: Row exists; final PROCESS_STATUS='SUCCESS'; timestamps and delta counters populated correctly.

Test Title: Verify SOURCE_SYSTEM captured as per record_source
Description: Ensure SOURCE_SYSTEM is not always VEEVA and reflects source run context (e.g., CLOSEUP_MARKET, GOB360_PM).
Pre-Requisite: Run one delta for CLOSEUP and one for GOB360 with different ETL_BATCH_IDs
Steps: Query AUDIT_PROCESS_LOG for those ETL_BATCH_IDs and compare SOURCE_SYSTEM.
Expected Result: SOURCE_SYSTEM matches the run source (e.g., CLOSEUP_MARKET or GOB360_PM), not incorrectly defaulted to VEEVA_CRM.

Test Title: Verify watermark row creation on first successful run
Description: Validate first successful run creates watermark entry by source object and watermark column.
Pre-Requisite: Watermark filter enabled; execute one successful delta run
Expected Result: One watermark row exists with non-null WATERMARK_VALUE, UPDATED_AT, and ETL_BATCH_ID.

Test Title: Verify watermark advances (or stays) and never regresses
Description: Validate WATERMARK_VALUE only moves forward when new max source_lastmodifieddate is higher.
Pre-Requisite: Run same macro twice with increasing source_lastmodifieddate in input
Steps: Capture WATERMARK_VALUE after run 1 and run 2; compare values.
Expected Result: Run 2 watermark is greater than or equal to run 1; it never decreases.

Test Title: Verify separate watermark tracking per source object
Description: Ensure product, identifier, and relationship maintain independent watermark rows.
Pre-Requisite: Run all three deltas for same source system and ETL_BATCH_ID
Steps: Query AUDIT_SOURCE_WATERMARK for SOURCE_OBJECT in (STG_PRODUCT_*, STG_IDENTIFIER_*, STG_RELATIONSHIP_*).
Expected Result: Independent rows exist per SOURCE_OBJECT; updates do not overwrite other objects.

Test Title: Verify lookback logic still captures boundary updates
Description: Validate records near previous watermark boundary are included due to configured lookback window.
Pre-Requisite: Have source records with SOURCE_LASTMODIFIEDDATE at/near prior watermark
Steps: Run delta with watermark filter enabled; check processed dataset and delta counts.
Expected Result: Boundary records are processed; no missed records around watermark cutoff.

Test Title: Verify no watermark update when max source_lastmodifieddate is null
Description: Ensure macro does not insert/update watermark when staging has no valid SOURCE_LASTMODIFIEDDATE.
Pre-Requisite: Prepare run with empty/invalid staging rows after DQ filtering
Steps: Execute macro and query watermark row before vs after.
Expected Result: WATERMARK_VALUE remains unchanged; no invalid null watermark overwrite occurs.

Test Title: Verify audit and watermark ETL_BATCH_ID traceability
Description: Validate ETL_BATCH_ID can trace one execution across process log and watermark tables.
Pre-Requisite: Run a delta macro with a known ETL_BATCH_ID value
Steps: Query both tables by ETL_BATCH_ID and related model/source object.
Expected Result: Matching ETL_BATCH_ID entries are available in process log and watermark rows for end-to-end traceability.
